title: YISSVIC Football Training Equipment Speed Agility Ladder Football Kick Trainer Set 6M 12-Rung with 10 Cones and 4 Stakes for Kids Children
features: This complete kit comes in only one box with "Agility Ladder" printed on top. Inside, you'll find a 12-rung 6M agility ladder, 10 cones, 1 Kick Trainer, 4 steel stakes for stability, and a carrying bag

Durable Material: The speed training ladder Constructed of nylon and high quality PP material. The football kick trainer is made of neoprene with integration design, making it durable and elastic to withstand thousands of hits and kicks

Agility ladder and Cones can improve the ability of fast footwork. The rungs can be slid up and down along the straps to change space between rungs to level up or down difficulty as you need, providing you with customized exercises and gradually toning up your footwork flexibility

The football kick trainer allows players to maximise the number of touches on the ball, keep the ball around you with this soccer trainer. And you have more time improving passing, receiving, ball control,throw-ins. Adjustable waist belt, great football training aid for kids and adults

This Agility Ladder Training Equipment Set is very helpful for sport training. Suitable for coaches, basketball players, soccer players, tennis players, rugby players and so on. Can also be used to create a fun obstacle course suitable for kids and adults. Great choice for Christmas, birthday or Easter gifts for kids children or people who love sports
